desc.size: Button sizes adjust the overall dimensions using padding, text size and inline icon size.
desc.style: Buttons can combine multiple styles—borders, rounded or circular shapes, and hover‑revealed backgrounds (like ghost buttons).
desc.theme: Buttons can use any theme color for their borders, backgrounds and text, and these can be combined with any style variant.
desc.noStyle: No‑style buttons reset the browser’s default appearance and give you a clean, neutral starting point
